src: Bitwig Studio extensions for many controllers: Ableton Push I/II, Akai APC40mkI/mkII/mini, Fire, Arturia Beatstep, Novation Launchpads / Remote SLs, NI Maschine / Komplete, Open Sound Control (OSC) and many more.
ja: Bitwig Studioの多彩なコントローラー向け拡張：Ableton Push I/II、Akai APC40mkI/mkII/mini、Fire、Arturia Beatstep、Novation Launchpads / Remote SLs、NI Maschine / Komplete、Open Sound Control（OSC）など多数。
